 205: 
 206: 
 207:     """
 208:     ovlp = np.empty((N_AO, N_AO), dtype = np.complex128)
 209: 
 210:     for block1 in range(N_blocks):
 211:         pgauss1 = primgauss_arr[block1] #(pgauss,3) boolean
 212:         N_pg1 = np.count_nonzero(pgauss1[:,0])
 213: 
 214:         AO1 = AO_arr[block1] #(N_AO) boolean
 215:         ints_i_x = ints_x[:,:,pgauss1[:,0]]
 216:         ints_i_y = ints_y[:,:,pgauss1[:,1]]
 217:         ints_i_z = ints_z[:,:,pgauss1[:,2]]
 218: 
 219:         for block2 in range(N_blocks):
 220:             pgauss2 = primgauss_arr[block2] #(pgauss,3) boolean
 221:             N_pg2 = np.count_nonzero(pgauss2[:,0])
 222:             AO2 = AO_arr[block2] #(N_AO) boolean
 223: 
 224:             tot = np.ones((R_id.shape[1], N_pg2, N_pg1), dtype='complex')
 225:             for d, ints_i in enumerate([ints_i_x, ints_i_y, ints_i_z]):
 226:                 ints_ij = ints_i[:,pgauss2[:,d]]
 227:                 tot *= ints_ij[R_id[d]]
 228:             tot = tot.sum(axis = 0)
 229: 
 230:             for i in np.nonzero(AO1)[0]: #AO for block1
 231:                 for j in np.nonzero(AO2)[0]: #AO for block2
 232:                     coeff1 = coeff_arr[i,:N_pg1] #(pgauss1)
 233:                     coeff2 = coeff_arr[j,:N_pg2] #(pgauss2)
 234:                     ovlp[i,j] = (tot@coeff1)@coeff2
 235: 
 236:     return ovlp
 237:     """
 238: 
 239: 
 240: 
 241: 
 242: '''
 243: def get_3D_overlaps_k_arrays(qG: np.ndarray, k_f: np.ndarray, primgauss_arr, AO_arr, coeff_arr, N_AO: int, mo_coeff_i: np.ndarray, mo_coeff_f_conj: np.ndarray, unique_Ri:list[np.ndarray], q_cuts: np.ndarray, path) -> np.ndarray:
 244:     R_id = np.load(parmt.store + '/R_ids/{}.npy'.format(np.sum(q_cuts < np.linalg.norm(qG)) - 1))
 245:     ints = []
 246:     for d in range(3):
 247:         ints.append(np.load(parmt.store + '/primgauss_1d_integrals/dim_{}/{:.5f}.npy'.format(d, qG[d]))[:,:,:] * np.exp(-1.j*unique_Ri[d][:]*k_f[None,d])[:,None,None])
 248:     ovlp = ovlp_sum_full_arrays(primgauss_arr, AO_arr, coeff_arr, ints[0], ints[1], ints[2], R_id) #numba optimized function
 249: 
 250:     return np.einsum('kbj,kba,kai->kij', mo_coeff_f_conj[None,:,:], ovlp[None,:,:], mo_coeff_i[None,:,:], optimize = path)[0] #This is faster with added k index for some reason??
 251: 
 252: @njit(nb.types.Array(nb.types.complex128, 2, 'C')(nb.types.Array(nb.types.boolean, 3, 'C'), nb.types.Array(nb.types.boolean, 2, 'C'), nb.types.Array(nb.types.complex128, 2, 'C'), nb.types.Array(nb.types.complex128, 3, 'C'), nb.types.Array(nb.types.complex128, 3, 'C'), nb.types.Array(nb.types.complex128, 3, 'C'), nb.types.Array(nb.types.int64, 2, 'F')))
 253: def ovlp_sum_full_arrays(primgauss_arr, AO_arr, coeff_arr, ints_x, ints_y, ints_z, R_id):
 254: 
 255:     N_blocks = 68
 256:     N_primgauss = 85
 257:     N_AO = 78
 258:     N_maxcoeff = 13
 259: 
 260:     ovlp = np.empty((N_AO, N_AO), dtype = np.complex128)
 261: 
 262:     for block1 in range(N_blocks):
 263:         pgauss1 = primgauss_arr[block1] #(pgauss,3) boolean
 264:         N_pg1 = np.count_nonzero(pgauss1[:,0])
 265: 
 266:         AO1 = AO_arr[block1] #(N_AO) boolean
 267:         ints_i_x = ints_x[:,:,pgauss1[:,0]]
 268:         ints_i_y = ints_y[:,:,pgauss1[:,1]]
 269:         ints_i_z = ints_z[:,:,pgauss1[:,2]]
 270: 
 271:         for block2 in range(N_blocks):
 272:             pgauss2 = primgauss_arr[block2] #(pgauss,3) boolean
 273:             N_pg2 = np.count_nonzero(pgauss2[:,0])
 274:             AO2 = AO_arr[block2] #(N_AO) boolean
 275: 
 276:             tot = np.ones((R_id.shape[1], N_pg2, N_pg1), dtype='complex')
 277:             for d, ints_i in enumerate([ints_i_x, ints_i_y, ints_i_z]):
 278:                 ints_ij = ints_i[:,pgauss2[:,d]]
 279:                 tot *= ints_ij[R_id[d]]
 280:             tot = tot.sum(axis = 0)
 281: 
 282:             for i in np.nonzero(AO1)[0]: #AO for block1
 283:                 for j in np.nonzero(AO2)[0]: #AO for block2
 284:                     coeff1 = coeff_arr[i,:N_pg1] #(pgauss1)
 285:                     coeff2 = coeff_arr[j,:N_pg2] #(pgauss2)
 286:                     ovlp[i,j] = (tot@coeff1)@coeff2
 287: 
 288:     return ovlp
 289: '''
